skill_match_scores: Scala:0.5, Java:1.0, Software Development Fundamentals:1.0, Software Architecture:0.0, Web Technologies:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field, or equivalent training or work experience, 3 years of experience in a technical field, You work diligently with team members and project management to understand requirements to provide technical solutions and direction, You are comfortable with ambiguity and being part of conversations where discordant views are present, You have an intermediate understanding of software development fundamentals and architecture, and you aren't dogmatic about technology choices, You have experience with Java, Scala, and associated technologies, You have experience building and maintaining highly automated systems that leverage tools such as Jenkins, Cloud Formation, Terraform, Kubernetes, and Spinnaker
preferred_quals: You preferably are interested in learning about/have experience with web technologies and web system architecture, You preferably have knowledge/experience with AWS products and services (EC2, S3, Lambda, DynamoDB, ElastiCache, CloudFront, etc.) or other cloud providers
core_responsibilities: Be a part of a team of big data and backend engineers to deliver high value projects, Build components of large-scale data platform for real-time and batch processing, and own features of big data applications to fit evolving business needs, Participate in building next generation service platform on cloud-based big data infrastructure for batch and streaming data applications, and continuously improve performance, scalability and availability, Participate in sprint planning, backlog refinement, and retrospectives as a team, Build automated tests to ensure application reliability, Participate in code reviews
job_summary: The Walt Disney Company is a leading diversified international family entertainment and media enterprise. They are seeking a Software Engineer II to join the API Services team, focusing on building highly available and high throughput services that deliver quality content to subscribers.
